## How to verify

## Checklist

- [ ] Build passes (`pnpm build`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`pnpm test:ci`)
- [ ] Lint + format clean (`pnpm lint && pnpm format:check`)
- [ ] Typecheck clean (`pnpm typecheck`)
- [ ] If this changes a public API, a changeset is included (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] If this adds or changes a component, the manifest, docs, and registry are updated
- [ ] Vercel preview URL renders the change correctly
